kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Beatrix's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the Fletcher.
Sheriff goes with exactly four of Rowan, Fletcher, Loom, Millpond, and 7 coins.
The artisan in Highrow's levy is between the artisan serving the Prince and the artisan with the Loom.
Chisel goes with neither Weaver nor 9 coins.
The artisan serving the Sheriff's levy is immediately next to the artisan in Riverside.
Aldric's levy is immediately below the artisan with the Loom.
The Cooper's levy is at least 6 coins more than the artisan with the Saw.
The artisan with 9 coins and the artisan in Millpond are in the same guild.
The artisan serving the Bishop belongs to the Clothiers' Guild.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Dale's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Crappie.
Shrimp goes with exactly four of Royce, Crappie, Spoon, Stillwater, and 8 lb.
The angler at Pinehollow's weight is between the angler fishing with Nightcrawler and the angler using the Spoon.
Spinnerbait goes with neither Perch nor 10 lb.
The angler fishing with Shrimp's weight is immediately next to the angler at Willowmere.
Cody's weight is immediately below the angler using the Spoon.
The angler who landed the Catfish's weight is at least 6 lb more than the angler using the Wobbler.
The catch with 10 lb and the angler at Stillwater are in the same family.
The angler fishing with Leech belongs to the Pike Family.
